name: small medical clinics processing 5–15 invoices/month tool
description: For small medical clinics processing 5–15 invoices/month, disorganized billing records cause cash flow gaps. We organize and digitize records instead of manual record keeping and spreadsheets.
problem_solved: disorganized billing records leading to cash flow gaps
features: manual data entry for billing records
